title: Giftmaker Pack 6 Mini Novelty Christmas Crackers Blue & Red Santa & Sleigh Design
features: CHRISTMAS WITH A BANG: Each cracker contains a sticker, a festive hat, a snap, and a motto. Pull the cracker to kick off your Christmas with a fun, traditional bang!
TRADITIONAL EXPERIENCE: Christmas crackers are a beloved part of holiday celebrations, adding a classic touch to your festivities.
IDEAL FOR ANY FESTIVE OCCASION: Pack of 6 novelty mini Christmas crackers, can be placed around your Christmas dinner or maybe for a New Years Eve Party!
GREAT AS A GIFT: Share the joy of the holiday season by gifting this pack of Christmas crackers. They make a fun and festive present that everyone can enjoy!
PERFECT FOR YOUR CHRISTMAS DINNER: These festive crackers are ideal to put in your tree until the big day and then use as part of your dinner setting. Approx Sizing: 150 x 35mm
description: Add a touch of fun and tradition to your Christmas festivities with this delightful pack of 6 mini novelty Christmas crackers. Each cracker is beautifully designed in red and blue, featuring a charming Santa and Sleigh design, and hand-tied with a white rope. Perfect for any festive occasion, these crackers are sure to bring joy and laughter to your celebrations. Each cracker contains a sticker, a festive hat, a snap, and a motto. Pull the cracker to kick off your Christmas with a fun, traditional bang!
